use_cases: A creative idea input interface for AI-powered content generation platforms
An interactive chat card with image and data analysis quick-action buttons
A prompt input card for design or marketing automation tools
A creative brief submission interface for collaboration platforms
ai_summary: A visually polished creative card component featuring a glass-morphism chat input with glow effects, dark mode support, and quick-action buttons for image upload, data analysis, and sending. Designed for creative/AI platforms as an interactive idea submission interface with hover animations and tag-based options.
